context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 73 validated the epoch reset feature. Key findings: (1) Old epoch data (7444 trades, 6032 orders) successfully archived to trades_archive_epoch1/orders_archive_epoch1 collections, (2) Live collections cleared and in-memory state reset, (3) Paper balance correctly shows ~$995 (within $5 of $1000 baseline), (4) PnL chart shows fresh curve starting at 15:27 UTC, (5) Shadow system unaffected and still active, (6) Risk config preserved (max_position_size=25, arb_max_exposure=8, crypto_max_exposure=250), (7) Epoch marker (epoch_2) ensures idempotency - only ran once. The epoch reset logs appear only once at 15:24:46-47 UTC.
